partner.name: EFSUMB
partner.fullName: European Federation of Societies for Ultrasound in Medicine and Biology
partner.desc: Curriculum alignment and joint accreditation for all SonoSchool European-track courses.

partner.name: WINFOCUS
partner.fullName: World Interactive Network Focused On Critical Ultrasound
partner.desc: Co-authorship of critical care ultrasound curricula and global certification recognition.

partner.name: ACEP
partner.desc: Endorsement of emergency POCUS modules and continuing medical education credits.

partner.name: ESC
partner.desc: Collaboration on point-of-care echocardiography standards and faculty certification.

partner.name: ISUOG
partner.fullName: International Society of Ultrasound in Obstetrics and Gynecology
partner.desc: Partnership on obstetric POCUS curriculum design and clinical guideline alignment.

partner.name: ISS
partner.desc: Joint research and education initiatives in haemodynamic POCUS for shock management.
